metadata.siteTitle: GreenHome Canada - Greener Homes Retrofit Grant
metadata.siteDescription: Apply for federal retrofit grants to make your home more energy efficient. Get up to $40,000 for heat pumps, solar panels, insulation, windows, and more.

footer.siteDescription: Federal retrofit grants for Canadian homeowners.

home.alertFiscal: for the 2025-2026 fiscal year. Funding is available on a first-come, first-served basis.
home.heroDesc: Get up to {maxTotal} in federal grants to make your home more energy efficient. Reduce your carbon footprint and save on energy costs with upgrades like heat pumps, solar panels, insulation, and more.
home.step1Desc: Verify you qualify based on home ownership, property type, and location.
home.step2Desc: Submit your application with property details and your planned retrofit upgrades.
home.step3Desc: Hire qualified professionals and have your retrofit work completed.
home.step4Desc: Upload before/after photos and get professional sign-off to receive your grant.
home.availableGrantsDesc: Multiple retrofit categories are available. You can apply for grants in more than one category.
home.validationDesc: To ensure the integrity of the program, all retrofit work must be validated. Homeowners take before and after photos, and a qualified professional (builder, engineer, electrician, or plumber) provides a signed validation of the completed installation.
home.photoDocDesc: Take dated photos before work begins and after completion. Shows the area, equipment, and installation quality.
home.proSignOffDesc: A licensed builder, engineer, electrician, or plumber verifies the work meets code and program standards.
home.receiveGrantDesc: Once validated, your grant is deposited directly into your bank account within 4-6 weeks.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Make Your Home Greener?
home.ctaDesc: Check your eligibility in under 2 minutes, then start your application today. Funding is limited.

grants.pageDesc: The Canada Greener Homes Retrofit Grant program offers funding across multiple categories. You may apply for grants in more than one category. Review the details below to plan your retrofit project.
grants.tipText: Combining multiple upgrades (e.g., insulation + air sealing + heat pump) maximizes energy savings and total grant funding.
grants.metaDesc: Explore all available retrofit grant categories including heat pumps, solar power, insulation, windows, and more.

eligibility.pageDesc: Answer a few questions to find out if you qualify for the Canada Greener Homes Retrofit Grant. This takes less than 2 minutes.
eligibility.isOwnerQuestion: Are you the registered owner of the property?
eligibility.yearBuiltNote: Home must be an existing structure (not new construction).
eligibility.eligibleDesc: Based on your responses, your property in {province} may qualify for the Canada Greener Homes Retrofit Grant. The next step is to submit a full application.
eligibility.notEligibleDesc: Based on your responses, your property may not qualify. Common reasons include:
eligibility.notOwner: You must be the registered homeowner
eligibility.notPrimaryResidence: The property must be your primary residence
eligibility.noPropertyType: You must select a property type
eligibility.noProvince: You must select your province or territory
eligibility.errorContact: If you believe this is an error, call 1-800-O-Canada (1-800-622-6232) for assistance.

apply.step3Desc: Select the retrofit upgrades you plan to make. You can choose multiple categories.
apply.step4Desc: Upload any supporting documents. These are optional at the application stage but will be required during validation.
apply.proofOfOwnership: Proof of Ownership (e.g., property tax bill, title deed)
apply.dragDrop: Drag and drop files here, or
apply.pdfJpgPng: PDF, JPG, or PNG up to 10MB
apply.pdfJpgPngEach: PDF, JPG, or PNG up to 10MB each
apply.step4Note: Before and after photos and professional validation will be required after your retrofit work is complete. You can submit these through the
apply.name: Name:
apply.warningText: By submitting this application, you confirm that all information provided is accurate. False or misleading information may result in denial of your application or repayment of grant funds.
apply.agreeText: I confirm that I am the registered owner of this property, the information provided is accurate, and I agree to the
apply.agreeTextEnd: of the Canada Greener Homes Retrofit Grant program.
apply.confirmationEmail: A confirmation email has been sent to
apply.decisionTime: You will receive a decision within 10 business days.
apply.nextStep1: Wait for your application to be reviewed and approved (up to 10 business days).
apply.nextStep2: Once approved, you have 12 months to complete your retrofit work.
apply.nextStep3: Take before photos, complete the work, then take after photos.
apply.nextStep4: Have a qualified professional validate the installation.
apply.nextStep5: Submit your validation package through the

validation.pageDesc: After your retrofit work is complete, submit before and after photos along with a professional validation to receive your grant funding.
validation.photoDesc: Upload clear, well-lit photos showing the area before and after the retrofit work. Photos should include date stamps if possible.
validation.beforePhotoDesc: Show existing equipment/area before work began
validation.afterPhotoDesc: Show completed installation from similar angles
validation.beforeTip1: Clear view of the area before work
validation.beforeTip3: Include date stamp or newspaper if possible
validation.additionalPhotosDesc: Add more photos showing work in progress, equipment details, permits, etc.
validation.proDesc: A licensed professional must verify that the retrofit work was completed to code and program standards. Accepted professionals include builders, engineers, electricians, and plumbers.
validation.acceptedList: Licensed builder, P.Eng / P.Geo engineer, master electrician, licensed plumber, certified energy advisor, HVAC technician.
validation.workDescPlaceholder: Describe the retrofit work performed, equipment installed, and any relevant details...
validation.meetsCodeQuestion: Does the installation meet all applicable building codes and program standards?
validation.proCommentsPlaceholder: Any additional notes about the installation quality, recommendations, etc.
validation.uploadSignedFormDesc: Upload the signed professional validation form
validation.declarationText: By submitting this validation, both the homeowner and the validating professional confirm that all information and photos are accurate and truthful. Fraudulent submissions may result in criminal charges and repayment of grant funds.
validation.successDesc: Your validation for application {ref} has been submitted successfully.
validation.successNote: Our team will review your submission within 5-7 business days. If approved, your grant will be deposited within 4-6 weeks.
validation.next1: Photos and professional validation will be reviewed
validation.next2: We may contact you or your professional for clarification
validation.next3: Once approved, grant funds are deposited via direct deposit

dashboard.pageDesc: Track your applications, validation status, and grant payments.
dashboard.helpValDesc: Need help finding a qualified professional?
dashboard.helpPayDesc: Grant payments are processed within 4-6 weeks after validation approval.
